reviews.comment:
Fue en el YPF ACA de Dolores. La atención del maxikiosco, regular y caro, en comparación de otras estaciones de servicio. Lo positivo,baños impecables .

(Translated by Google)
It was at the YPF ACA station in Dolores. The service at the convenience store was mediocre and expensive compared to other stations. On the plus side, the restrooms were spotless.

reviews.comment:
Un excelente lugar para descansar en la mitad de camino entre la capital federal y Mar Del plata.
Tiene una estación  YPF con buena atención, un bar Full con mucha variedad para tomar o comer, con mesas indoor y outdoor.
Tiene juegos para niños.
También es un lugar muy grande con césped y arboleda.
Tiene mesas y bancos de material para comer o tomar el mate.
Y Tiene un gran número de baños con cambiador para bebés, jabón papel y todo lo necesario .No importa de que mano de la ruta estén si van para mardel hay una salida que cruza la ruta 2 por encima y pega la vuelta y baja para poder acceder hay que prestar atención para no pasarlo de largo aprox. Kilómetro 210..

(Translated by Google)
An excellent place to rest halfway between Buenos Aires and Mar del Plata.
It has a YPF gas station with good service, a Full bar with a wide variety of drinks and food, with both indoor and outdoor seating.
There's a children's playground.
It's also a very large area with grass and trees.
There are tables and benches for eating or enjoying mate.
And there are plenty of restrooms with baby changing facilities, soap, paper towels, and everything you need. No matter which side of the highway you're on, if you're heading towards Mar del Plata, there's an exit that crosses over Route 2, loops around, and goes down to access it. Pay attention so you don't miss it. It's around kilometer 210.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNady1XV1VBEAE
